# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_ome_application_certificate (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `business_name` (String) Name of the business that issued the certificate. This option is applicable for `generate_csr`.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `command` (String) `generate_csr` allows the generation of a CSR. `upload` uploads the certificate on OpenManage Enterprise. `upload_cert_chain` uploads the certificate chain on OpenManage Enterprise.
- `country` (String) Country in which the issuer resides. This option is applicable for `generate_csr`.
- `country_state` (String) State in which the issuer resides. This option is applicable for `generate_csr`.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `department_name` (String) Name of the department that issued the certificate. This option is applicable for `generate_csr`.
- `distinguished_name` (String) Name of the certificate issuer. This option is applicable for `generate_csr`.
- `email` (String) Email associated with the issuer. This option is applicable for `generate_csr`.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `locality` (String) Local address of the issuer of the certificate. This option is applicable for `generate_csr`.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `subject_alternative_names` (String) Subject alternative name required for the certificate signing request generation. Supports up to 4 comma separated values starting from primary, secondary, Tertiary and Quaternary values.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `upload_file` (String) Local path of the certificate file to be uploaded. This option is applicable for `upload` and `upload_cert_chain`. Once the certificate is uploaded, OpenManage Enterprise cannot be accessed for a few seconds. The formats of the certificate file are .crt, .cer, .ca-bundle, .p7b, .der, and .pem.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `csr_status` (String) Details of the generated certificate.
- `error_info` (String) Details of the HTTP error.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) Overall status of the certificate signing request.
